summary: ANDROID | Language change - After succesful Lang change previous one is selected in settings, after second change unavailable dialog appears
scenario: Language selection in settings shows previous language and displays "Update currently not available" dialog after firmware update language change on Poly Studio Mobile app
description_clean: After a successful language change via firmware update, the previous language selection is still displayed in settings. When attempting to change the language again, a dialog saying "Update currently not available" appears. After restarting the app, the correct firmware version (with the new language) is displayed.
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android
Connect to a Poly Bluetooth audio device
Perform a firmware update that includes a language change
After successful firmware update, go to Device Settings → [Device Name]
Observe the language selection displayed in settings
Attempt to change the language again via the language selection option
Close the app and restart Poly Studio Mobile
Navigate back to Device Settings → [Device Name] and check the firmware version displayed
expected: After a successful firmware update with a language change, the language selection in settings should immediately reflect the new language. Attempting to change the language again should allow the user to select a different language without errors. After restarting the app, the correct firmware version (with the new language) should be displayed.
actual: After a successful firmware update with a language change, the previous language selection is still displayed in settings. When attempting to change the language again, a dialog appears saying "Update currently not available". After restarting the app, the correct firmware version (with the new language) is displayed.
